ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight ABC123
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking with GlobalAir. Please find below the details of your upcoming flight:

• Flight: ABC123
• Departure: New York (JFK) – 08:45 AM, 15 September 2026
• Arrival: London Heathrow (LHR) – 08:15 PM, 15 September 2026
• Aircraft: Boeing 777‑300ER
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Class: Business
• Baggage Allowance: 2 pieces, 32 kg each

Check‑in opens 24 hours before departure at https://checkin.globalair.com. You can review or change your seat assignment via the link above.

Should you need assistance or wish to modify any details, feel free to contact our customer support at +1‑800‑555‑1234 or email support@globalair.com.

Safe travels!

Best regards,

GlobalAir Customer Service

---
GlobalAir – Your Journey, Our Commitment

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Support Ticket #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
To: john.smith@company.com

Dear John,

This is an automated notification from GlobalIT Helpdesk. A ticket has been created under the reference number **987654** for your recent request regarding the “Access to Finance Module – Error 503.”

**Ticket Details**
- **Issue:** Unable to access Finance module
- **Reported On:** 14 September 2026, 10:12 AM
- **Current Status:** Awaiting Verification

Our records indicate that your account has not been verified for the Finance module, which is a prerequisite for compliance with the new regulatory guidelines. Failure to complete this verification within the next 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account privileges.

To expedite the process, please log into the IT Helpdesk portal and confirm your identity by following the secure link below:

<URL>

After logging in, you will be prompted to upload a scanned copy of your employee ID and a recent utility bill. Once verified, the Finance module access will be restored immediately.

If you did not initiate this ticket, please disregard this message. Otherwise, please act promptly to avoid service disruption.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

GlobalIT Helpdesk Team

---
GlobalIT – Secure Your Digital Workspace
